title: cymbidium ochroleucum
intro: Cymbidium ochroleucum, also known as the yellow-leaved cymbidium, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is valued for its ability to relieve inflammation, reduce fever, and aid in the healing process, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Cymbidium ochroleucum can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and have been used to treat a range of health issues, including bronchitis, pneumonia, and digestive problems.
